summary: K9Command Account Governance & Features Testing Complete. All 24 backend API tests passed. Frontend pages load correctly in mock mode. Fixed BookingStatus enum missing 'pending_approval' value.

integration_issues.issue: Frontend operates in 'mock' mode by default (localStorage-based). Set REACT_APP_DATA_MODE=api to use backend APIs.

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: BookingStatus enum was missing 'pending_approval' value causing GET /api/bookings to fail with 500 error
Frontend dataClient operates in mock mode by default - uses localStorage instead of backend APIs
Email service is in mock mode (no SMTP configured) - emails stored in email_outbox collection
Square payments are mocked (no SQUARE_ACCESS_TOKEN configured)
seed_data_creation: Created test staff requests during testing (approved/rejected)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Account governance fully tested. Customer registration works freely. Staff registration returns 202 (pending approval). Admin registration blocked if admin exists. Email templates and staff management pages work in mock mode. BookingStatus enum now includes 'pending_approval'.

frontend_pages.customer_calendar: PASS - Calendar displays, date selection works
frontend_pages.admin_dashboard: PASS - Shows stats and navigation cards
frontend_pages.admin_email_templates: PASS - Template editor and outbox tabs work

bugs_fixed.impact: GET /api/bookings was returning 500 error for customers with pending_approval bookings

mocked_apis.email_smtp: MOCKED - No SMTP credentials configured, emails stored in email_outbox collection
